clusters.justification: This domain captures the overarching integration of autonomic physiological arousal and valenced emotional processing necessary for generalized responses to environmental threats and internal state changes.
This domain represents the high-level computations of subjective value, reward expectation, and incentive motivation that critically guide goal-directed choice and decision-making.

This domain encompasses the high-level representation of intentional agents, utilizing shared neurocognitive architecture to process both self-referential autobiographical models and interpersonal inferences about others.
